ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ts_code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., 600255.SH) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the stock is listed on */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "vol" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data feed */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., reliable, questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, news event) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is relevant to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
